creator: Unknown
description: There are two recordings of Saddam Hussein's death. The officially released footage which is found of the event stopped short of showing the actual execution. I found the amateur video shot using a camera phone from a staircase leading up to the gallows surfaced, it contained low-quality footage of the entire hanging. The amateur footage, unlike the official footage, included sound; witnesses could be heard taunting Saddam at the gallows. On 3 January 2007, the Iraqi government arrested the guard who they believe made the mobile phone video. However, it was too late to prevent the video from spreading across the Internet. Proof that it exists includes: https://web.archive.org/web/20081011031239/https://www.washingtonpost.com/wp-dyn/content/article/2007/01/03/AR2007010300358.html https://web.archive.org/web/20110829005618/http://www.metacafe.com/watch/362748/saddam_hussein_execution_amateur_footage/ https://web.archive.org/web/20070104165726/http://www.ibtimes.com/articles/20070102/saddam-web-tv.htm There are many edited versions out there, but I found the original one. Here it is. https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x5max5c
subject: Saddam
Hussein
